name: EncounterInpatient
title: Encounter Inpatient
purpose: (Clinical Focus: The purpose of this value set is to represent concepts of  inpatient hospitalization encounters.),(Data Element Scope: This value set may use a model element related to Encounter.),(Inclusion Criteria: Includes concepts that represent an encounter for elective and non-elective inpatient hospitalizations.),(Exclusion Criteria: No exclusions.)

concept.display: Hospital admission, elective, with complete pre-admission work-up (procedure)
Hospital admission, elective, with partial pre-admission work-up (procedure)
Emergency hospital admission from observation unit (procedure)
Hospital admission, elective, without pre-admission work-up (procedure)
